title: Marketplace Manager - HomeLane - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - HomeLane - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!
